prompt: Create a case study for the Content Engine. It pulls ideas from the daily news brief and YouTube, scores them with opportunity scores, researches with OpenAI web search, writes finished content for LinkedIn, Instagram, and blog, and repurposes via flywheel (Blog -> LinkedIn + Instagram). Built by NexusPoint. Powered by Next.js, OpenAI, Google Workspace, Sheets API. Logs everything to Google Sheets and saves content to Google Docs.
